response.justification: The candidate does not meet the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows platform (5–10 years), with their primary expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages. While they have some C++ experience, it is limited to older roles (e.g., LabWindows/CVI) and not recent or Windows-focused. Domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income is absent, and key skills like SQL Server/Oracle are not prominently featured.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with diverse tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, etc.)
Proven ability to work in high-performance environments (e.g., handling millions of HTTP requests)
Demonstrated leadership and mentorship through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
concerns: Lacks required 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows platform
No evident experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income systems
Primary expertise is in web/mobile development, not financial-services domain or low-latency systems
